evidence: docs/repository-improvement-product-redesign.md — explicit product vision: "Open Agent IDE → see the next best improvement → generate one prompt → implement → validate → refresh → repeat"
productJudgment.reasoning: Transforms Agent IDE from a repository-intelligence browser into a focused improvement operating system. Every user visit answers one question: what is the single highest-impact improvement and what happens next? Addresses the primary user journey end-to-end. All other product opportunities are components or downstream effects of this loop.
